rby-7b1.description:
- Adds support for Pokemon Yellow.
- Splits Red and Blue into separate "game" names. This also means this apworld will be usable concurrently with the core pokemon_rb.apworld or the version 6 beta apworld.
- Adds "Mapped" and "Insanity Mapped" door shuffle options. Mapped swaps indoor rooms with other rooms that have the same number of exit warps, so that the result follows the original game's topology (Route 2 Viridian Forest Gate entrances will lead to a series of 3 two-exit rooms, connecting each other). Rooms connected by hole drops, non-mixed warp tiles, or other "forced" connections are considered one room for these purposes. Insanity Mapped includes outdoor areas in the pool. 
- The Pokemon encountered by the "Old Man" is shuffled when Randomize Pokemon Locations is enabled, according to the chosen option.
- A major cause of crashes causing arbitrary checks to send out was patched to prevent that from happening.

Expect this to be broken, and report your findings!
rby-7b1.title: Pokémon Red, Blue, and Yellow: Version 7, Beta 1
